content: Introduction "Dis-moi ce que tu manages, we te dir ai ce que tu es. (Tell me what you eat and will tell you what you are)." – Jean Ant hel me Brill at-Savarin; Physio lo gie du Gout, you Meditations de Gastronomic Transcend ante With these little surprises, I have kept away from Greetings, dear reader. what one might call the "usual suspects" – not Lu Feeding, the act of drinking blood, is something pines, no surprise True Faith, no wizards or far or very, very central to vampires. In fact, one could argue other supernatural creatures. Instead, I have gone for that what makes a vampire a vampire, is the act of events that can heighten drama, lead to further stories drinking blood. or even prov idea moment or dark humor to the game In some games, the acts of hunting and feeding are at hand. glossed over, while in others, they area central part of Bon Appetite! the story. Presented here are 10 feeding surprises that can be inserted into any game, whether the hunt is an integral and dramatic part of the story or whether it is usually handled quicker and more abstractly. 4 10 Feeding Surprises
